properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I wanna go to Heaven, and pick a never fading flower, From the mountain overlooking the temple of my God. I wanna go to Heaven, where all is light and glory, How I long to be with Jesus! How I long to be with God!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Some times I think that I could stay here no longer. I feel very lonely here, for I've seen a better land! Oh! That I had wings like a dove, Then would I fly away, and be at rest.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I wanna go to Heaven, I wanna hear the voice of Jesus, "You have washed your robes in my blood, stood stiffly for my truth." And when I get to Heaven I'll cast my crown at Jesus feet! I wanna praise His name forever! He has done so much for me!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I wanna go to Heaven, I wanna pledge my love to Jesus, "I will gird myself and serve you, for you suffered much for me." And when I get to Heaven I wanna sit at Jesus' table! Oh! To eat the fruit of that land, To go back to earth no more!
